description: Firewall assignment replace: PUTs the firewall_ids body (no query when pagination is unset). Local rejection texts (missing linode_id, missing firewall_ids, confirm) diverge, so only the success request is fixtured (see report).

cases.name: replaces firewall assignments with the firewall_ids body
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This replaces firewall assignments for a Linode instance. Set confirm=true to proceed.
